category_title: Students using inappropriate language and avoiding assignment tasks in computer labs
scenario_title: Independent drafting in the computer laboratory
minimal_context: The student is seated in the computer laboratory to research their topic and draft text for a persuasive marketing brochure using a scaffolding template.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please open your scaffolding template on the computer and start researching and drafting the text for your marketing brochure.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: This is stupid. I find this curriculum completely irrelevant and it's too hard.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just look at the models provided and try to write something down.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't even want to be here. School is just a shelter from unemployment anyway.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to complete the tasks to pass the subject. Please keep working.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Stands up and leaves the desk) This is fucking bullshit. I'm not doing any more work, that's all I'm doing for the whole 70 minutes.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please open your scaffolding template on the computer and start researching and drafting the text for your marketing brochure.

STUDENT: This is stupid. I find this curriculum completely irrelevant and it's too hard.

TUTOR: Just look at the models provided and try to write something down.

STUDENT: I don't even want to be here. School is just a shelter from unemployment anyway.

TUTOR: You need to complete the tasks to pass the subject. Please keep working.

STUDENT: (Stands up and leaves the desk) This is fucking bullshit. I'm not doing any more work, that's all I'm doing for the whole 70 minutes.

task.content: Researching their individual topics and drafting their texts for a persuasive marketing brochure or a script for a business proposal to be delivered in a speech
task.learning_goal: Complete the tasks to pass the subject

context.social_setting: Individual seatwork with teacher monitoring and individual teacher-student dialogue

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: During individual seatwork when expected to focus and actually do some work on the assignment
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Leaving desks, engaging in off-task behaviour, swearing, and completing minimal work over 70 minutes
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Finds the curriculum irrelevant or too hard; school has become a shelter from unemployment
related_quotes: That's it? All you've done in 70 minutes?

behavior_patterns.condition: When expected to work independently on assignments in the computer lab
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Experience of schooling is negative; they do not get on with teachers
related_quotes: Can you please stop the language. I don't like it!
Watch your language . . . that's not appropriate!

behavior_patterns.condition: During extended periods of individual seatwork
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Leaving their desk, acting inappropriately, and avoiding the assignment task
related_quotes: Can you please come back to your desk and actually do some work on your assignment?
Stop being inappropriate and get on with your work!
